{{CargoRelic
|name=Snowy Treasure Map
|class_id=20934
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=An old treasure map with faint and rough sketches depicting snowy landscapes. Deciphering the map to uncover treasures seems to be an increasingly challenging task...
|fame=31
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail RUSH +10<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +1<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss2=Snail RUSH +20<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +2<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss3=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss4=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss7=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500<br> (Awakened)
}}
